rules.title: List container must use native list element
rules.description: The .list element must be an <ol> or <ul> native HTML element to convey list structure to assistive technology. role='list' must also be present to restore VoiceOver/Safari semantics when list-style:none is applied.
rules.expected: element is <ol> or <ul> AND has role='list' attribute

conditions: element tag is 'ol' OR element tag is 'ul'

rules.message: List container is not a native <ol> or <ul> element, or is missing role='list'.
rules.fix: Use <ol class="list list--ordered ..."> or <ul class="list list--unordered ..."> and add role="list".

rules.title: List item must use native <li> element
rules.description: Every .list__item must be a native <li> element, a direct child of the .list container.
rules.expected: element tag is 'li' AND direct child of <ol> or <ul>

conditions: parent element tag is 'ol' OR parent element tag is 'ul'

rules.message: List item is not a native <li> element or is not a direct child of <ol>/<ul>.
rules.fix: Use <li class="list__item ..."> as a direct child of the list container.

rules.title: List container must contain only <li> children
rules.description: The <ol> or <ul> element must contain only <li> elements as direct children. Text nodes and non-li elements inside a list are invalid HTML.
rules.expected: all direct children of .list are <li> elements
rules.message: List container has non-<li> direct children.
rules.fix: Ensure only <li> elements are direct children of the list.

rules.title: Icon in with-icon list must carry aria-hidden
rules.description: The .list__icon span and the SVG it contains must carry aria-hidden='true' to suppress redundant AT announcements. The item text in .list__text provides the accessible label.
rules.expected: element has aria-hidden='true' OR contains svg with aria-hidden='true'
rules.message: Icon in with-icon list item is missing aria-hidden='true'. Screen readers will announce icon content.
rules.fix: Add aria-hidden="true" to <span class="list__icon"> or to the <svg> inside it.

rules.title: Every list item must contain visible text
rules.description: Each .list__item must contain a .list__text span with non-empty text content. This ensures every item has an accessible label and visible content.
rules.message: List item is missing .list__text or .list__text has empty content.
rules.fix:
Add Item label inside each
  • .

rules.title: Ordered and unordered list items must NOT contain a .list__marker element
rules.description: Markers for ordered and unordered list types are generated by CSS counters via ::before (LTR) and ::after (RTL). No .list__marker HTML element is permitted — its presence indicates a regression to the old implementation.
rules.message: Ordered or unordered list item contains a .list__marker element. Markers must be CSS-generated, not HTML elements.
rules.fix: Remove <span class="list__marker"> from the list item. Ensure list.css defines ::before (LTR) and ::after (RTL) counter content on .list__item.

rules.title: List CSS must not use primitive token references directly
rules.description: Component CSS selectors must reference --list-* component tokens, not --Text-*, --Global-*, or --Font-* global tokens directly. If --list-* tokens are not yet in token.css, use the component token name with a TODO comment and fallback.
rules.expected: no direct use of --Text-*, --Global-*, --Font-*, --Size-*, --Line-Height-* in component selectors
rules.message: Component CSS uses a primitive global token directly. Replace with the corresponding --list-* component token.
rules.fix: Replace var(--Text-text-primary) with var(--list-text-primary, var(--Text-text-primary)). Add --list-text-primary to token.css.

rules.title: List container must have a type modifier
rules.description: Every .list element must carry one type modifier: .list--ordered, .list--unordered, or .list--with-icon.
rules.expected: element has one of: class list--ordered, list--unordered, list--with-icon
rules.message: List container is missing a type modifier class.
rules.fix: Add one of: list--ordered, list--unordered, list--with-icon to the .list element.

rules.title: List container must have a style modifier
rules.description: Every .list element must carry one style modifier: .list--primary, .list--neutral, or .list--on-color.
rules.expected: element has one of: class list--primary, list--neutral, list--on-color
rules.message: List container is missing a style modifier class.
rules.fix: Add one of: list--primary, list--neutral, list--on-color to the .list element.
